new_articles.title: Premium family SUVs that offer comfort without luxury pricing
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Premium family SUVs that offer comfort without luxury pricing'이다. Indian families are increasingly opting for SUVs, with a growing 'premium plus' segment offering luxury features without the hefty price tag. Modern SUVs now prioritize cabin ergonomics, advanced technology, and robust safety for all passengers. The pre-owned market, especially for models like the Hyundai Alcazar, presents a cost-effective way to access these premium comforts and practicalities, making family travel more enjoyable and secure. The pre-owned market, especially for models like the Hyundai Alcazar, presents a cost-effective way to access these premium comforts and practicalities, making family travel more enjoyable and secure ET Special In the evolving Indian automotive market, the definition of a family vehicle has shifted significantly For buyers searching for a spacious and practical vehicle, the pre-owned market offers a wide range of options that deliver premium features and long-term value without stretching the budget Several used Hyundai cars in India, along with models from other leading brands, provide a comfortable and refined experience for all passengers while also remaining cost-effective to maintain over time valuating available options, comparing prices and features can help narrow down the right choice based on your family’s needs and budget. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10'이다. The company plans to issue 17. 79 million new shares at a value of 45. 45 trillion won ($29. 65 billion). SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change " "We expect to elevate our status as a global company by broadening our touchpoints in the United States, the epicenter of AI technological innovation," SK Hynix said in the filing SK Hynix holds about 60% of the HBM market share, according to Counterpoint research director MS Hwang Shares in SK Hynix have soared over 280% this year, propelling its market capitalization above $1 trillion as investors piled into companies seen as key beneficiaries of the global scramble for HBM chips Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix together account for more than 40% of South Korea's benchmark Kospi , raising concerns that the market could become more exposed to risks, including supply chain disruptions and a slowdown in global data center investment. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Alpha Wave sells entire 1.9% stake in Delhivery; stock falls over 2%
matched_articles.summary: Mirae Asset 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Alpha Wave sells entire 1.9% stake in Delhivery; stock falls over 2%'이다. Global investment firm Alpha Wave Global has divested its entire 1. 93% stake in logistics giant Delhivery for Rs 665 crore. This significant exit saw the firm offload over 1. 44 crore shares. In related news, venture capital firm Nexus Venture Partners also sold a substantial stake in Delhivery, while Mirae Asset Venture Investments reduced its holding in logistics firm Shadowfax Technologies. At the end of the March quarter, Alpha Wave Ventures, LP held a 1 93 per cent stake in Gurugram-based Delhivery In a separate bulk deal on the BSE, Mirae Asset Venture Investments divested nearly a 1 per cent stake in third-party logistics firm Shadowfax Technologies for Rs 120 crore through an open market transaction 50 lakh shares on Wednesday, amounting to a 0 97 per cent holding in Bengaluru-based Shadowfax Technologies, as per the data.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan'이다. SEOUL -- SK Hynix's shares rallied on the Seoul stock market Thursday, thanks to the chipmaker's detailed plan to list its American depositary receipt. Plan to raise $29 billion and Micron's strong earnings help boost as well. Equities SK Hynix jumps 15% on Nasdaq ADR listing plan Plan to raise $29 billion and Micron's strong earnings help boost as well SK Hynix’s ADR listing on the Nasdaq is expected to rank as the second-largest share flotation in history (Photo by Kotaro Hosokawa) KIM JAEWON June 25, 2026 16:44 JST SEOUL -- SK Hynix's shares rallied on the Seoul stock market Thursday, thanks to the chipmaker's detailed plan to list its American depositary receipts (ADRs), valued about 45 trillion won ($29 billion), on the Nasdaq next month Datawatch SpaceX's debut fires first salvo in new era of mega-IPOs Latest on Equities Equities India's small and mid-cap stocks draw growth-hunting investors Equities SK Hynix eyes raising up to $29bn in Nasdaq ADR listing Equities Tokyo Stock Exchange plans upgrade to double trade volume capacity. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing'이다. Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29. 4 billion. Micron's quarterly results reinforced expectations that the market for artificial intelligence memory chips remains supply-constrained, a positive signal for fellow memory-chip maker SK Hynix, analysts said "This is a very positive read-across for SK Hynix, who are exposed to the exact same market dynamics," said Rolf Bulk, head of semiconductors and infrastructure at Futurum Group SK Hynix said the ADR listing would broaden its investor base and allow "its true corporate value to be properly evaluated "SK Hynix is one of the clearest ways to gain exposure to AI-driven memory demand, but its Korea-only listing has limited access for many global investors," he told CNBC Shares of SK Hynix are up more than 300% year-to-date. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
matched_articles.original_title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
matched_articles.original_summary: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.

matched_articles.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix targets $29-billion U.S. listing
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s SK Hynix targets $29-billion U.S. listing'이다. Offering could be the second-biggest share sale after SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO. investors “The most attractive benefit for investors is that SK Hynix will trade on Nasdaq alongside rival Micron, giving the company an opportunity to be re-rated in the U market,” said Ryu Young-ho, a senior analyst at NH Investment & Securities Capacity expansion SK Hynix said the proceeds from the listing of American Depositary Receipts will be used to build chip factories in South Korea and purchase chipmaking equipment such as an extreme ultraviolet scanner made by Dutch equipment maker ASML ASML-Q , shares of which rose 1 “The ADR listing should not materially change our view on SK Hynix or the memory sector,” said Gary Tan, a Singapore-based portfolio manager at Allspring Global Investments “The headline capital raise appears large but implies only limited dilution and remains modest relative to its mid-term capex plans. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix targets $38b US listing as AI demand surges
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix targets $38b US listing as AI demand surges'이다. The world’s second-largest memory chipmaker plans to issue up to 17. 79 million new shares. Riding the AI boom, SK Hynix's shares quadrupled AI generated SEOUL – South Korea’s SK Hynix said on June 24 it plans to raise up to US$29 Access to US investors “The most attractive benefit for investors is that SK Hynix will trade on Nasdaq alongside rival Micron, giving the company an opportunity to be re-rated in the US market,” said Ryu Young-ho, a senior analyst at NH Investment & Securities Capacity expansion SK Hynix said the proceeds from the listing of American Depositary Receipts will be used to build chip factories in South Korea and purchase chip making equipment such as an extreme ultraviolet scanner made by Dutch equipment maker ASML, shares of which rose 1 “The ADR listing should not materially change our view on SK Hynix or the memory sector,” said Gary Tan, a Singapore-based portfolio manager at Allspring Global Investments. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
